articles.author: Abid Hussain
articles.title: Afghanistan bombing: What’s Pakistan’s strategy as India-Taliban ties grow? - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Pakistani air raids break fragile ceasefire as Islamabad faces pressure on both borders.
articles.content:
Islamabad, Pakistan In the weeks before the Pakistani military carried out air raids inside Afghanistan over the weekend, violence had been unrelenting.
